---
name: fastapi-python
description: "FastAPI Python skill. Use when writing FastAPI routers, Pydantic schemas, pytest tests, or OpenTelemetry instrumentation in this project. Covers route definitions, request/response models, in-memory store patterns, and test client usage."
argument-hint: "Describe the task (e.g., 'add new route', 'add Pydantic schema', 'write pytest test', 'add telemetry span')"
---

## Procedure

1. Identify the layer: router / schema / store / telemetry / test
2. Load the matching reference file
3. Add or update the corresponding pytest test

|-------|-----------|

| Schemas | [schemas.md](./references/schemas.md) |
| Tests | [testing.md](./references/testing.md) |
| Telemetry | [telemetry.md](./references/telemetry.md) |
